Description: Augment provides Augie, an AI teammate that automates complex logistics tasks so operations teams can focus on decisions and customer relationships. Description: Firestorm builds modular, mission-adaptable unmanned aerial systems that enable rapid on-site deployment and reconfiguration for defense users. Its platforms use an open-system, quick-connect architecture with swappable propulsion modules and patent-pending designs to shorten assembly and maintenance time. The company supplies expeditionary manufacturing cells (xCell) and a flight controller (OCTRA) that integrates AI autopilots and third-party software to support distributed production and autonomous operation. Firestorm leverages additive manufacturing and portable micro-factory units to produce and modify airframe components in the field. The company primarily serves military and defense contractors seeking low-cost, rapidly deployable UAS solutions.
